description_long: This is a white ceramic coffee cup with a rounded body and a sturdy handle. The front of the cup features a large pink circular logo with a stylized 'M' made of a repeating triangular pattern, and green text reading 'Damn Fine Cup of Coffee' curving along the bottom. The cup's surface is matte and smooth, with no visible chips or cracks. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior is plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's white color. The cup is of standard size, suitable for serving hot beverages in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A white ceramic coffee cup with a pink logo, green text, and a sturdy handle, featuring a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink logo with a stylized 'M' and green text, as well as the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view focused on the handle, with no visible logo or text.
description_view_2: Side view showing the plain white surface and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing part of the logo and text wrapping around the cup's side.
